name: S-15 standards-remove --check-orphan-rules warns when a rule still cites the source being removed
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree/ns && printf -- '- id: custom-spec
' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: custom-spec
rules:
  id: r-1
  source: custom-spec
' > tree/ns/custom-spec.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id custom-spec --tree tree --check-orphan-rules 2>err.txt && grep -qiE 'orphan|r-1' err.txt && echo warned 1>&2
